title: Leptidium molle
intro: Leptidium molle, also known as Smooth Pepperwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its delicate, edible leaves and stems. The Smooth Pepperwort is valued for its health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Leptidium molle include glucosinolates, isothiocyanates, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Smooth Pepperwort is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional medicine formulas for its therapeutic benefits.
